phases.name: Write autoresearch CLI tests
phases.reasoning: Create all 7 tests in src/cmd/autoresearch/mod.rs: test_autoresearch_args_default_values, test_autoresearch_args_custom_values, test_expand_specialists_all, test_expand_specialists_custom_list, test_expand_specialists_empty_string, test_generate_tag_format, test_cli_recognizes_autoresearch. These cover default arg parsing, explicit arg parsing, specialist expansion (all, custom, empty), tag format validation, and smoke test. Tests will initially fail since the struct/functions don't exist yet. Must preserve existing judge.rs submodule.

phases.name: Implement autoresearch CLI registration
phases.reasoning: Implement AutoresearchArgs struct with 8 clap fields and defaults, expand_specialists() and generate_default_tag() helpers, async cmd_autoresearch placeholder in src/cmd/autoresearch/mod.rs. Wire Commands::Autoresearch variant into src/main.rs enum with match arm. Add pub use autoresearch::cmd_autoresearch to src/cmd/mod.rs. Update module table comment. Run cargo clippy, fix any lints. Verify all tests pass with cargo test --lib cmd::autoresearch and cargo build is clean.
